text: Completed the limited Breeze-equivalence sweep: explicit capability/non-equivalence matrix; matrix-RHS solve and least-squares migration shims; Breeze-compatible symmetry/failure guards; rank/condition, special-value, aliasing, layout, and typed-failure parity; JDK 22 Vector GEMM/GEMV kernels with direct same-process Breeze VectorBLAS JMH. Final gates: core JVM 371, core JS 368, laws JVM/JS 30/30 each, parity 31, interop 24, Vector 27, native 3, FFM 12; JMH and FFM benchmarks compile. Two-fork JDK 22 results: Vector GEMM 1.43-1.67x pure and within 7.4% of Breeze at n=256 / 4.0% at n=512; Vector GEMV 1.77-1.98x pure but 17-29% behind Breeze. CI covers Vector on JDK 21 and 22; JDK 22 verified locally.
